{{Infobox location
| name = Kanatalia
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Kanatalia Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Kanatalia is the [[Guild]] of [[Alchemists]], an organization that maintains various chapter houses and specialized workshops throughout the world. These facilities vary significantly in design, ranging from domed structures to buildings featuring large rooftop glass tanks or glowing lamps. The guild operates an Alchemical Academy, which includes professional training and groups for amateur learners. While the organization is known for celebrating successful experiments with festivities, it also conducts darker work; specifically, its members perform experiments on high-level prisoners within [[Imperial]] prisons to alter their minds and bodies in an attempt to increase docility. The guild is overseen by a [[Guild Head]], such as [[Nathanael Bareius]], and maintains strict control over its workshops and the distribution of alchemical materials. Members of the guild include highly experienced professionals, journeymen, and investigators who monitor the illegal manufacture and smuggling of unregulated alchemical substances.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Kanatalia]] is a place where alchemists hold parties.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c10">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Kanatalia]] is part of the [[Guild]] of [[Alchemists]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Kanatalia is a location that serves as a site for apprenticeships and may produce modern devices. The area contains a chapter house and was once the setting of an investigation into [[Fletcher]] regarding the manufacturing of illicit substances. During certain events, [[Meia]] was left in the care of this place.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kanatalia]] investigated [[Fletcher]] for manufacturing illicit substances.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kanatalia]] is a place where one can be an apprentice.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kanatalia]] has a chapter house.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] was left in the care of [[Kanatalia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kanatalia]] is a location that may produce modern devices.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Kanatalia]] only responds to blatant attacks.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Kanatalia]] is a location containing various alchemical workshops.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Kanatalia]] rejects certain third-rate alchemical supplies.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kanatalia]] has a grand Alchemical Academy.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kanatalia]] is home to the best medical alchemists in the world.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
